---
title: "Standardized_serology - Maternal TdaP vs. TT - all mat and cord time periods"
subtitle: "All infants received wP vaccine"
author: "Scot Zens"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
    number_sections: false
    theme: cosmo
    highlight: textmate
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
## workflowr::wflow_build(files = here("./analysis/standard_serology_igg_ap_matpm_prevacvacc_j.Rmd"))
## code below generates files which match standard_serology_igg_v2.wp_matpm.rmd for vaccinated and boosted visits
## code below written to test revised code for t.test() from R update 

library(here)
library(workflowr)
library(rmarkdown)
library(tidyverse)
library(extrafont)
library(fpc)
library(DBI)
library(DT)
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggpubr)
library(stringr)
library(ggfortify)

library(missMDA)
library(FactoMineR)
library(NbClust)
library(clValid)
library(kohonen)

library(mclust)
library(cluster)
library(papeR)
library(rmarkdown)
library(kableExtra)
library(skimr)
library(pheatmap)

library(dendextend)
library(janitor)
library(qgraph)
library(boot)
library(polycor)
library(rcompanion)
library(pvclust)

library(GGally)   
library(mvtnorm)
library(ggplot2)
library(olsrr)
library(drc)
library(cgam)
library(gratia)
library(glmtoolbox)
library(emmeans)
library(stats) 
library(MASS)
library(rstatix)
library(hrbrthemes)

#### set options
options(useFancyQuotes = FALSE)

#### load colors
source(here::here("./code/colors.R"), local = TRUE)
# #### load cluster functions
# source(here("./code/cluster_functions.R"), local = TRUE)
# #### load number of clusters function modified for the madi program.
# source(here("./code/nbclust_madi.R"), local = TRUE)
# #### load correlation functions
# source(here("./code/feature_correlation.R"), local = TRUE)
```


```{r specify parameters, include=FALSE}
selected_infant_arm <- "aP"

color.values <- c(arm.matpm.color)
color.labels <- c("TT", "TdaP")

t0 <- "M00"
# t1 <- "mo4"
t1 <- "M02"
t2 <- "M05"

timeperiods <- c(t0, t1, t2)

antigenlist<-c("DT", "FHA", "PRN", "PT", "TT")
# antigenlist <- c("PT","PRN","FHA","FIM","DT","TT","IPV1","IPV2","IPV3")
igglist<-c("DT_IgG", "FHA_IgG", "PRN_IgG", "PT_IgG", "TT_IgG")
fulligglist<-c("PT_IgG", "PRN_IgG", "FHA_IgG", "TT_IgG", "DT_IgG")

## ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
## Whole-bacterium functional assays standardized against a SINGLE antigen-
## specific total IgG (not their own antigen). At intake (see the load chunk)
## each assay row is relabelled so that:
##   * antigen  -> the standardizing antigen, whose total IgG becomes the
##                regressor and under whose tab the assay is displayed; and
##   * feature  -> out_feature, the key written to the residual RData file.
## The rest of the standardization machinery is then reused unchanged.
## EDIT source_feature to the exact strings in c_set.RData
## (verify with: table(ebaa_extra$feature)). igg_antigen must appear in igglist.
## out_feature should match what the downstream standardized analysis looks up
## (the matpm bubble analysis expects PRN_SBA and PT_PTNA).
wholeassay_map <- tibble::tribble(
  ~source_feature, ~igg_antigen, ~out_feature,
  "WHOLE_SBA",     "PRN",        "PRN_SBA",   # serum bactericidal activity  ~ PRN total IgG
  "WHOLE_WT_IgG",  "PRN",        "PRN_WT",    # whole-cell total IgG binding ~ PRN total IgG
  "WHOLE_PTNA",    "PT",         "PT_PTNA"    # PT-neutralising activity     ~ PT total IgG
)

residual_pathname_wp <-"./data/igg_standard_residuals_ap_matpm_prevacvacc_k_trn.RData"
modelfit_pathname_wp <-"./data/igg_standard_model_fit_ap_matpm_prevacvacc_k_trn.RData"
residual_filename_wp <- here::here(residual_pathname_wp)
modelfit_filename_wp <- here::here(modelfit_pathname_wp)

```


```{r load data, include=FALSE}
#### load data
# source(here("./code/format_raw_data.R"), local = TRUE)
load(file = here::here("./data/d_set.RData"))
data_extra <- ebaa_extra2
table(data_extra$infant_arm)
table(data_extra$maternal_arm)
table(data_extra$infant_arm,data_extra$maternal_arm)
table(data_extra$arm_name)
data <- data_extra[data_extra$infant_arm==selected_infant_arm, ]
table(data$subject_accession, data$arm_name)
table(data$infant_arm)
table(data$maternal_arm)
table(data$infant_arm,data$maternal_arm)
table(data$arm_name)

data$arm_name <- factor(data$maternal_arm)
table(data$arm_name)
levels(data$arm_name) <- c("TdaP", "TT")
table(data$arm_name)
data$arm_name <- relevel(data$arm_name, ref = "TT")
table(data$arm_name)
## Rebuild `feature` from antigen + analyte so its casing matches `igglist`/
## `fulligglist` and the downstream bubble analysis (which reconstructs feature
## the same way). The raw feature column is inconsistently cased across assays
## (e.g. PT_IGG vs WHOLE_WT_IgG); `analyte` carries the canonical mixed case.
data$analyte <- as.character(data$analyte)
data$antigen <- as.character(data$antigen)
data$feature <- factor(paste(data$antigen, data$analyte, sep = "_"))

table(data$feature, data$antigen)
table(data$visit_name, data$antigen)
table(data$visit_name, data$analyte)

## --- bring in whole-bacterium functional assays (WHOLE_SBA, WHOLE_WT_IgG, WHOLE_PTNA) ---
## Relabel each assay row so its `antigen` is the standardizing antigen (whose
## total IgG is the regressor) and its `feature` is the residual key. Because the
## relabelled antigen (PRN or PT) is already in `antigenlist` and its total IgG is
## in `igglist`, the existing per-antigen merge and fit loop then standardize each
## assay against the chosen total IgG with no further changes. No-op + warning if
## none of the source features are present.
data$feature <- as.character(data$feature)
data$antigen <- as.character(data$antigen)
wa_idx <- data$feature %in% wholeassay_map$source_feature
if (sum(wa_idx) == 0) {
  warning("wholeassay_map: none of {", paste(wholeassay_map$source_feature, collapse = ", "),
          "} found for arm ", selected_infant_arm,
          "; whole-bacterium assays skipped. Check table(ebaa_extra$feature).")
} else {
  wa <- wholeassay_map[match(data$feature[wa_idx], wholeassay_map$source_feature), ]
  data$antigen[wa_idx] <- wa$igg_antigen   # regress against (and display under) this antigen's total IgG
  data$feature[wa_idx] <- wa$out_feature   # residual key saved to the RData file
  cat("whole-assay rows relabelled (", selected_infant_arm, "):", sum(wa_idx), "\n")
}
data$feature <- factor(data$feature)
data$antigen <- factor(data$antigen)
print(table(droplevels(data$feature[data$feature %in% wholeassay_map$out_feature]),
            droplevels(data$antigen[data$feature %in% wholeassay_map$out_feature])))

data_e <- data[data$antigen %in% antigenlist & data$visit_name %in% timeperiods, ]
data_e$visit_name <- droplevels(data_e$visit_name)
data_e$antigen <- droplevels(data_e$antigen)

# use imputed values
# data_e$value_reported <- data_e$value_imputed
### a log transformed variable of assay results
## use value +1 to avoid possible 0's that would generate NAs
data_e$log_assay_value <- log10(data_e$value_reported + 0.0001)

## Filter total IgG values by antigen to merge with main data
#first time point (t0)
data_igg_MFI_t0 <-data_e[data_e$feature %in% igglist & data_e$visit_name==t0, ]
data_igg_MFI_t0 <-subset(data_igg_MFI_t0,
                           select=c("subject_accession","visit_name", "antigen","value_reported", "log_assay_value"))
names(data_igg_MFI_t0)[names(data_igg_MFI_t0) == "log_assay_value"]<-"log_total_IgG_MFI"
names(data_igg_MFI_t0)[names(data_igg_MFI_t0) == "value_reported"] <-"total_IgG_MFI"

#second time point (t1)
data_igg_MFI_t1 <-data_e[data_e$feature %in% igglist & data_e$visit_name==t1, ]
data_igg_MFI_t1 <-subset(data_igg_MFI_t1,
                            select=c("subject_accession","visit_name", "antigen", "value_reported", "log_assay_value"))
names(data_igg_MFI_t1)[names(data_igg_MFI_t1) == "log_assay_value"]<-"log_total_IgG_MFI"
names(data_igg_MFI_t1)[names(data_igg_MFI_t1) == "value_reported"]<-"total_IgG_MFI"


#third time point (t2)
data_igg_MFI_t2 <-data_e[data_e$feature %in% igglist & data_e$visit_name==t2, ]
data_igg_MFI_t2 <-subset(data_igg_MFI_t2,
                            select=c("subject_accession","visit_name", "antigen", "value_reported", "log_assay_value"))
names(data_igg_MFI_t2)[names(data_igg_MFI_t2) == "log_assay_value"]<-"log_total_IgG_MFI"
names(data_igg_MFI_t2)[names(data_igg_MFI_t2) == "value_reported"]<-"total_IgG_MFI"

# #4th time point (t3)
# data_igg_MFI_t3 <-data_e[data_e$feature %in% igglist & data_e$visit_name==t3, ]
# data_igg_MFI_t3 <-subset(data_igg_MFI_t3,
#                             select=c("subject_accession","visit_name", "antigen", "value_reported", "log_assay_value"))
# names(data_igg_MFI_t3)[names(data_igg_MFI_t3) == "log_assay_value"]<-"log_total_IgG_MFI"
# names(data_igg_MFI_t3)[names(data_igg_MFI_t3) == "value_reported"]<-"total_IgG_MFI"

## merge total IgG by time point to main dataset
# data_igg_MFI<-rbind(data_igg_MFI_t0, data_igg_MFI_t1, data_igg_MFI_t2, data_igg_MFI_t3)
data_igg_MFI<-rbind(data_igg_MFI_t0, data_igg_MFI_t1, data_igg_MFI_t2)
data_exna<-merge(data_e, data_igg_MFI, by=c("subject_accession","visit_name", "antigen"), all = TRUE)

  # tdata_cxna <- pivot_wider(data_exna, id_cols = c("subject_accession","visit_name"), names_from = "feature", values_from = "value_imputed")
  # table(tdata_cxna$visit_name)
  # table(na.omit(tdata_cxna)$visit_name)
  # View(filter(tdata_cxna, if_any(everything(), ~ is.na(.))))
```


```{r  prep_standard_igg, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

cat("## Standardize Serology by Total IgG", "{.tabset}")
cat("\n \n")
## Start df to compile model residuals
data_residv_total = data.frame()
data_lmstatsv_total = data.frame()
data_lmstatsx_total = data.frame()

## take out igg vs. igg comparison
data_exna_s<- data_exna[!(data_exna$feature %in% c(fulligglist)),]
data_exna_s$feature <- droplevels(data_exna_s$feature)
data_exna_s <- as.data.frame(data_exna_s)

antigen_list <- as.character(unique(data_exna_s$antigen))

r2 <- function(x){  
  SSe <- sum((x$resid)^2)  
  observed <- x$resid+x$fitted 
  SSt <- sum((observed-mean(observed))^2)  
  value <- 1-SSe/SSt
  return(value)
  }  

#I used this function to calculate a weighted r-squared from the robust linear model
r2ww <- function(x){
  SSe <- sum((x$w*x$resid)^2); #the residual sum of squares is weighted
  observed <- x$resid+x$fitted;
  ## SSt <- sum(x$w*(observed-weighted.mean(observed,x$w))^2)
  SSt <- sum((x$w*(observed-mean(observed)))^2); #the total sum of squares is weighted      
  value <- 1-SSe/SSt;
  return(value);
}

rsquare = function(y_actual,y_predict){
  cor(y_actual,y_predict)^2
}

rsquare_inlier = function(x){
  ### select tuning proportion of set
  x <- x[x$wclas >= 0.5, ]
  SSe <- sum((x$resid)^2)  
  observed <- x$resid+x$fitted 
  SSt <- sum((observed-mean(observed))^2)  
  value <- 1-SSe/SSt
  return(value);
}
          
adj_r2 <- function(nobs, ncoef, rsq) {
  return (1 - ((1-rsq)*(nobs-1)/(nobs-ncoef-1)))
}
```

```{r fit_models, fig.width=10, eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, dpi=144, results="asis"}
    
for (antigen in antigen_list)
  {
    cat("### Antigen: ", antigen, "{.tabset}") 
    cat("\n \n")
    antigen_data  <- data_exna_s[data_exna_s$antigen == antigen, ]
    antigen_data  <- antigen_data[order(antigen_data$antigen,antigen_data$feature), ]
    feature_list <- unique(antigen_data$feature)
    for (feature in feature_list)
    {
      cat("#### Feature: ", feature, "{.tabset}")
      cat("\n \n")
      # i <- paste0(antigen,"_",str_to_upper(analyte))
      i <- feature
      analyte_data  <- antigen_data[antigen_data$feature==feature, ]
      visit_list <- unique(analyte_data$visit_name)
        # for (visit in visit_list) {
          # visit_label <- case_when(
          #   visit == "prevaccinated" ~ "month 2",
          #   visit == "mo4" ~ "month 4",
          #   visit == "vaccinated" ~ "month 5",
          #   visit == "vaccinated9" ~ "month 9",
          #   TRUE ~ "unmatched"  # optional: for cases that don't match
          # )
          visit <- "all_visits"
          visit_label <- "All Visits"
          cat("##### Visit: ", str_to_upper(visit_label))
          cat("\n \n")

          ### restrict the CMV gB to seroconverted only _ Anais and Loic 13March2024
          # data_m1 <- analyte_data[analyte_data$visit_name==visit, c("subject_accession", "visit_name", "feature", "arm_name", "log_assay_value", "log_total_IgG_MFI")]
          data_m1 <- analyte_data[, c("subject_accession", "visit_name", "feature", "arm_name", "log_assay_value", "log_total_IgG_MFI")]

          data_m1<-na.omit(data_m1)
          data_m1 <- data_m1[order(data_m1$log_total_IgG_MFI), ]
          lm_simp <- lm(log_assay_value~log_total_IgG_MFI, na.action=na.omit, data=data_m1)
          data_m1$w_func <- abs(1 / lm(abs(lm_simp$residuals) ~ lm_simp$fitted.values)$fitted.values)
          # discrete weighting= 0 for influential points, 1 for all others
          data_m1$w_disc <- as.numeric(abs(rstudent(lm_simp)) < 3 & abs(cooks.distance(lm_simp)) < 4/nrow(lm_simp$model))
          data_m1$w_disc <- ifelse (data_m1$w_disc == 0, data_m1$w_disc+0.001, data_m1$w_disc)
          zero_weights <- nrow(as.data.frame(data_m1[data_m1$w_disc < 1, ]))

          
          gam_fit <- cgam(log_assay_value ~ s.incr(log_total_IgG_MFI, numknots = 2, knots = 0, var.knots = 0, space = "Q", db.exp = TRUE), data=data_m1, cic = FALSE, nsim = 100) 
          gam_fitted.value <- as.numeric(gam_fit$muhat)
          gam_residuals <- as.numeric(gam_fit$y) - as.numeric(gam_fit$muhat)
          data_m1$wg_func <- abs(1 / lm(abs(gam_residuals) ~ gam_fitted.value)$fitted.values)
          # discrete weighting= 0 for influential points, 1 for all others
                    
          # print(paste(antigen, analyte, visit, i))
          # cat(" \n \n")
          
          modx <- log_assay_value ~ log_total_IgG_MFI
          
          #print(paste("lm models"))
          # model 1 - simple linear regression
          mod_fit <- lm(modx, na.action=na.omit, data=data_m1)
          #print(paste("after unweighted fit"))
          data_m1$fitted.value_mod1 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$fitted.values)
          data_m1$resid_mod1 <- mod_fit$residuals
          data_m1$resid = mod_fit$residuals
          data_m1$fitted = as.numeric(mod_fit$fitted.values)
          data_m1$w_func <- psi.huber(data_m1$resid)
          data_m1$w <- 1
          data_m1$wclas <- data_m1$w_disc
          data_stats = data.frame(model = c("linear: unweighted"))
          data_stats$modeln <- 1
          data_stats$feature <- i
          data_stats$visit <- visit
          sink("NULL")
          smod_fit <- invisible(summary(mod_fit))
          sink()
          #print(paste("after unweighted summary"))
          data_stats$intercept_value<- smod_fit$coefficients[1,1]
          data_stats$slope_value <- smod_fit$coefficients[2,1]
          data_stats$pbeta <- smod_fit$coefficients[2,4]
          data_stats$nobs <- nrow(data_m1)
          data_stats$ncoefficients <- 2
          data_stats$r.squared  <- smod_fit$r.squared
          data_stats$adj.r.squared <- smod_fit$adj.r.squared
          data_stats$r2inlier <- adj_r2(nobs = data_stats$nobs, 
                                             ncoef = data_stats$ncoefficients, 
                                             rsq = rsquare_inlier(data_m1))
          data_stats$selmodel <- 0
          data_lmstatsv_total<-rbind(data_lmstatsv_total,data_stats)
          data_lmstatsx_total<-rbind(data_lmstatsx_total,data_stats)
          #print(paste("after unweighted"))

          #model 2 - assign discrete weights
          data_m1$w <- data_m1$w_disc
          data_m1$wclas <- data_m1$w_disc
          mod_fit <- lm(modx, weights=as.numeric(data_m1$w), na.action=na.omit, data=data_m1)
          data_m1$fitted.value_mod2 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$fitted.values)
          data_m1$resid_mod2 <- mod_fit$residuals
          data_m1$resid = mod_fit$residuals
          data_m1$fitted = as.numeric(mod_fit$fitted.values)
          data_stats = data.frame(model = c("linear: discrete"))
          data_stats$modeln <- 2
          data_stats$feature <- i
          data_stats$visit <- visit
          sink("NULL")
          smod_fit <- summary(mod_fit)
          sink()
          data_stats$intercept_value<- smod_fit$coefficients[1,1]
          data_stats$slope_value <- smod_fit$coefficients[2,1]
          data_stats$pbeta <- smod_fit$coefficients[2,4]
          data_stats$nobs <- nrow(data_m1)
          data_stats$ncoefficients <- 2
          data_stats$r.squared  <- smod_fit$r.squared
          data_stats$adj.r.squared <- smod_fit$adj.r.squared
          data_stats$r2inlier <- adj_r2(nobs = data_stats$nobs, 
                                             ncoef = data_stats$ncoefficients, 
                                             rsq = rsquare_inlier(data_m1))
          data_stats$selmodel <- 0
          data_lmstatsv_total<-rbind(data_lmstatsv_total,data_stats)
          data_lmstatsx_total<-rbind(data_lmstatsx_total,data_stats)

          #model 3 - assign weights using function (WLS)
          data_m1$w <- data_m1$w_func
          data_m1$wclas <- data_m1$w_disc
          mod_fit <- lm(modx, weights=as.numeric(data_m1$w), na.action=na.omit, data=data_m1)
          data_m1$fitted.value_mod3 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$fitted.values)
          data_m1$resid_mod3 <- mod_fit$residuals
          data_m1$resid = mod_fit$residuals
          data_m1$fitted = as.numeric(mod_fit$fitted.values)
          data_stats = data.frame(model = c("linear: continuous"))
          data_stats$modeln <- 3
          data_stats$feature <- i
          data_stats$visit <- visit
          sink("NULL")
          smod_fit <- summary(mod_fit)
          sink()
          data_stats$intercept_value<- smod_fit$coefficients[1,1]
          data_stats$slope_value <- smod_fit$coefficients[2,1]
          data_stats$pbeta <- smod_fit$coefficients[2,4]
          data_stats$nobs <- nrow(data_m1)
          data_stats$ncoefficients <- 2
          data_stats$r.squared  <- smod_fit$r.squared
          data_stats$adj.r.squared <- smod_fit$adj.r.squared
          data_stats$r2inlier <- adj_r2(nobs = data_stats$nobs, 
                                             ncoef = data_stats$ncoefficients, 
                                             rsq = rsquare_inlier(data_m1))
          data_stats$selmodel <- 0
          data_lmstatsv_total<-rbind(data_lmstatsv_total,data_stats)
          data_lmstatsx_total<-rbind(data_lmstatsx_total,data_stats)
          
          # print(paste("gam models"))
          #model 4 - cgam constraints: smooth increasing
          data_m1$w <- 1
          mod_fit <- cgam(log_assay_value ~ s.incr(log_total_IgG_MFI, numknots = 3, knots = 0, var.knots = 0, space = "Q", db.exp = TRUE), data=data_m1, cic = FALSE, nsim = 100) 
          data_m1$fitted.value_mod4 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
          data_m1$resid_mod4 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$y) - as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
          data_m1$resid = as.numeric(mod_fit$y) - as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
          data_m1$fitted = as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
          data_m1$wg_func <- psi.huber(data_m1$resid)
          
          data_m1$wg_disc <- data_m1$w_disc
          if (nrow(data_m1[data_m1$w_disc < 1 & data_m1$w_func < (data_m1$wg_func * 1.0), ]) > 0)
            {
          data_m1[data_m1$w_disc < 1 & data_m1$w_func < (data_m1$wg_func *1.0), ]$wg_disc <- 1.00}
          zerog_weights <- nrow(as.data.frame(data_m1[data_m1$wg_disc < 1, ]))
          
          data_stats = data.frame(model = c("gam: unweighted"))
          data_stats$modeln <- 4
          data_stats$feature <- i
          data_stats$visit <- visit
          data_stats$intercept_value <- 0
          data_stats$slope_value <- mod_fit$zcoefs
          data_stats$pbeta <- mod_fit$pvals.beta
          data_stats$nobs <- nrow(data_m1)
          data_stats$ncoefficients <- 4
          data_stats$r.squared  <- r2(data_m1)
          # data_stats$r.squared  <- as.numeric(rsquare(mod_fit$y,mod_fit$muhat))
          data_stats$adj.r.squared <- adj_r2(nobs = data_stats$nobs, 
                                             ncoef = data_stats$ncoefficients, 
                                             rsq = data_stats$r.squared)
          data_stats$r2inlier <- adj_r2(nobs = data_stats$nobs, 
                                             ncoef = data_stats$ncoefficients, 
                                             rsq = rsquare_inlier(data_m1))
          data_stats$selmodel <- 0
          data_lmstatsv_total<-rbind(data_lmstatsv_total,data_stats)
          data_lmstatsx_total<-rbind(data_lmstatsx_total,data_stats)
          
          #model 5 - cgam discrete weights constraints: smooth increasing

          data_m1$w <- data_m1$wg_disc
          data_m1$wclas <- data_m1$wg_disc
          mod_fit <- cgam(log_assay_value ~ s.incr(log_total_IgG_MFI, numknots = 3, knots = 0, var.knots = 0, space = "Q", db.exp = TRUE), data=data_m1, weights = data_m1$w, cic = FALSE, nsim = 100) 
          data_m1$fitted.value_mod5 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
          data_m1$resid_mod5 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$y) - as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
          data_m1$resid = as.numeric(mod_fit$y) - as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
          data_m1$fitted = as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
          data_stats = data.frame(model = c("gam: discrete"))
          data_stats$modeln <- 5
          data_stats$feature <- i
          data_stats$visit <- visit
          data_stats$intercept_value <- 0
          data_stats$slope_value <- mod_fit$zcoefs
          data_stats$pbeta <- mod_fit$pvals.beta
          data_stats$nobs <- nrow(data_m1)
          data_stats$ncoefficients <- 4
          data_stats$r.squared  <- r2(data_m1)
          # data_stats$r.squared  <- as.numeric(rsquare(mod_fit$y,mod_fit$muhat))
          data_stats$adj.r.squared <- adj_r2(nobs = data_stats$nobs, 
                                             ncoef = data_stats$ncoefficients, 
                                             rsq = data_stats$r.squared)
          data_stats$r2inlier <- adj_r2(nobs = data_stats$nobs, 
                                             ncoef = data_stats$ncoefficients, 
                                             rsq = rsquare_inlier(data_m1))
          data_stats$selmodel <- 0
          data_lmstatsv_total<-rbind(data_lmstatsv_total,data_stats)
          data_lmstatsx_total<-rbind(data_lmstatsx_total,data_stats)
          
          #model 6 - cgam continuous weights constraints: smooth increasing
          data_m1$w <- data_m1$wg_func
          mod_fit <- cgam(log_assay_value ~ s.incr(log_total_IgG_MFI, numknots = 3, knots = 0, var.knots = 0, space = "Q", db.exp = TRUE), data=data_m1, weights = data_m1$w, cic = FALSE, nsim = 100) 
          data_m1$fitted.value_mod6 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
          data_m1$resid_mod6 <- as.numeric(mod_fit$y) - as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
          data_m1$resid = as.numeric(mod_fit$y) - as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
          data_m1$fitted = as.numeric(mod_fit$muhat)
          data_stats = data.frame(model = c("gam: continuous"))
          data_stats$modeln <- 6
          data_stats$feature <- i
          data_stats$visit <- visit
          data_stats$intercept_value <- 0
          data_stats$slope_value <- mod_fit$zcoefs
          data_stats$pbeta <- mod_fit$pvals.beta
          data_stats$nobs <- nrow(data_m1)
          data_stats$ncoefficients <- 4
          data_stats$r.squared  <- r2(data_m1)
          # data_stats$r.squared  <- as.numeric(rsquare(mod_fit$y,mod_fit$muhat))
          data_stats$adj.r.squared <- adj_r2(nobs = data_stats$nobs, 
                                             ncoef = data_stats$ncoefficients, 
                                             rsq = data_stats$r.squared)
          data_stats$r2inlier <- adj_r2(nobs = data_stats$nobs, 
                                             ncoef = data_stats$ncoefficients, 
                                             rsq = rsquare_inlier(data_m1))
          data_stats$selmodel <- 0
          data_lmstatsv_total<-rbind(data_lmstatsv_total,data_stats)
          data_lmstatsx_total<-rbind(data_lmstatsx_total,data_stats)

          #generate bivariate plot with regression lines (same as calculated above)

          rplot.color <- c('linear: unweighted' = "black", 'linear: discrete' = "red", 
                           'linear: continuous' = "blue",'gam: unweighted' = "green", 
                           'gam: discrete' = "purple", 'gam: continuous' = "darkgreen")
          
          ytab <- paste0("(", i, "+1)")
          zlabel = expression("log"["2"] ~ ytab)
          ylabel = expression("log"["2"] ~ "(Feature)")
          xlabel = expression("log"["2"] ~ "(Total IgG +1)")
          
          data_m1 <- as.data.frame(data_m1)
          data_m1$mean_observed <- ifelse(data_m1$log_assay_value > 0, mean(data_m1$log_assay_value),0)
          data_m1$resid_mod0 <- data_m1$log_assay_value - data_m1$mean_observed
          data_m1$fitted.value_mod0 <- data_m1$log_total_IgG_MFI
          
        data_tresid <- as.data.frame(pivot_longer(data=data_m1[,c("subject_accession","visit_name","feature","resid_mod0","resid_mod1","resid_mod2","resid_mod3","resid_mod4","resid_mod5","resid_mod6")], cols = c("resid_mod0","resid_mod1","resid_mod2","resid_mod3","resid_mod4","resid_mod5","resid_mod6"), names_to = "models", values_to = "resid"))
        data_tresid$modeln = 0
        data_tresid[data_tresid$models=='resid_mod0', ]$modeln <- 7
        data_tresid[data_tresid$models=='resid_mod1', ]$modeln <- 1
        data_tresid[data_tresid$models=='resid_mod2', ]$modeln <- 2
        data_tresid[data_tresid$models=='resid_mod3', ]$modeln <- 3
        data_tresid[data_tresid$models=='resid_mod4', ]$modeln <- 4
        data_tresid[data_tresid$models=='resid_mod5', ]$modeln <- 5
        data_tresid[data_tresid$models=='resid_mod6', ]$modeln <- 6
        
        data_tweight <- pivot_longer(data=data_m1[,c("subject_accession","feature","visit_name","w_func","w_disc","wg_func","wg_disc")], cols = c("w_func","w_disc","wg_func","wg_disc"), names_to = "models", values_to = "weight")
        data_tweight$modeln = NA
        data_tweight[data_tweight$models=="w_disc", ]$modeln <- 2
        data_tweight[data_tweight$models=="w_func", ]$modeln <- 3
        data_tweight[data_tweight$models=="wg_disc", ]$modeln <- 5
        data_tweight[data_tweight$models=="wg_func", ]$modeln <- 6
        data_tweight <- data_tweight[ , c("subject_accession","feature","visit_name","modeln","weight")]
        
        data_tresidw <- merge(data_tresid, data_tweight, by = c("subject_accession","feature","visit_name","modeln"), all.x = TRUE)
        data_tresidw[is.na(data_tresidw$weight)==TRUE, ]$weight <- 1
        data_tresidw$residw = data_tresidw$resid * data_tresidw$weight
        
        data_tresidw$modeln <- factor(data_tresidw$modeln)
        data_tresidw$absresidw <- abs(data_tresidw$residw)
        
        #update to t.test() for R version 4.4.2
        data_tresidw2 <- reshape(data_tresidw[, c("subject_accession","modeln","absresidw")],
                                direction = "wide",
                                idvar = "subject_accession", 
                                timevar = "modeln")
        pairedt12 <- t.test(Pair(absresidw.1, absresidw.2) ~ 1, data=data_tresidw2, alternative = "greater" )
        pairedt13 <- t.test(Pair(absresidw.1, absresidw.3) ~ 1, data=data_tresidw2, alternative = "greater" )
        pairedt14 <- t.test(Pair(absresidw.1, absresidw.4) ~ 1, data=data_tresidw2, alternative = "greater" )
        pairedt45 <- t.test(Pair(absresidw.4, absresidw.5) ~ 1, data=data_tresidw2, alternative = "greater" )
        pairedt46 <- t.test(Pair(absresidw.4, absresidw.6) ~ 1, data=data_tresidw2, alternative = "greater" )
        
        # pairedt12 <-  t.test(absresidw ~ modeln, data = data_tresidw[data_tresidw$modeln %in% c(1,2), c("subject_accession","modeln","absresidw")], paired = TRUE, alternative = "greater" )
        # pairedt13 <-  t.test(absresidw ~ modeln, data = data_tresidw[data_tresidw$modeln %in% c(1,3), c("subject_accession","modeln","absresidw")], paired = TRUE, alternative = "greater" )
        # pairedt14 <-  t.test(absresidw ~ modeln, data = data_tresidw[data_tresidw$modeln %in% c(1,4), c("subject_accession","modeln","absresidw")], paired = TRUE, alternative = "greater" )
        # pairedt45 <-  t.test(absresidw ~ modeln, data = data_tresidw[data_tresidw$modeln %in% c(4,5), c("subject_accession","modeln","absresidw")], paired = TRUE, alternative = "greater" )
        # pairedt46 <-  t.test(absresidw ~ modeln, data = data_tresidw[data_tresidw$modeln %in% c(4,6), c("subject_accession","modeln","absresidw")], paired = TRUE, alternative = "greater" )
        
        
### algorithm to choose best model
        if (min(data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln %in% c(1:3), ]$pbeta) > 0.05) 
          {
            selmodel <- 7
        } else if (max(data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln %in% c(1:6), ]$adj.r.squared) < 0.05) {
          selmodel <- 7
        } else if (max(data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln %in% c(1:6), ]$adj.r.squared) < 0.15)
          {
          if (min(data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln == 1, ]$pbeta) < 0.01) {
            selmodel <- 1
          # } else if (min(data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln == 4, ]$pbeta) < 0.01) {
          #   selmodel <- 4
          } else {
            selmodel <- 7
          }
            
        } else if (pairedt14$p.value < 0.05 & pairedt14$estimate > 0) {
                  selmodel <- 4
                  if (!is.na(pairedt45$p.value < 0.05 & pairedt46$p.value < 0.05 & data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln %in% c(1:6), ]$adj.r.squared[6] > data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln %in% c(1:6), ]$adj.r.squared[5])) {
                    if (pairedt45$p.value < 0.05 & pairedt46$p.value < 0.05 & data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln %in% c(1:6), ]$adj.r.squared[6] > data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln %in% c(1:6), ]$adj.r.squared[5]) {
                    selmodel <- 6
                  } 
                  } else if (!is.na(pairedt45$p.value)) {
                    if (pairedt45$p.value < 0.05 & pairedt45$estimate > 0) {
                    selmodel <- 5
                    }
                  } else if (!is.na(pairedt46$p.value)) {
                    if (pairedt46$p.value < 0.05 & pairedt46$estimate > 0) {
                            selmodel <- 6}
                  } else {
                            selmodel <- 4
                  }
        } else {
            selmodel <- 1
            if (!is.na(pairedt12$p.value < 0.05 & pairedt13$p.value < 0.05 & data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln %in% c(1:6), ]$adj.r.squared[3] > data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln %in% c(1:6), ]$adj.r.squared[2])) {
                    if (pairedt12$p.value < 0.05 & pairedt13$p.value < 0.05 & data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln %in% c(1:6), ]$adj.r.squared[3] > data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln %in% c(1:6), ]$adj.r.squared[2]) {
                    selmodel <- 3
                  } 
            } else if (!is.na(pairedt12$p.value)) {
              if (pairedt12$p.value < 0.05 & pairedt12$estimate > 0) {
              selmodel <- 2
              }
            } else if (!is.na(pairedt13$p.value)) {
              if (pairedt13$p.value < 0.05 & pairedt13$estimate > 0) {
                      selmodel <- 3
              }
            } else {
                      selmodel <- 1
                    }
        }
        
### end model fit selection algorithm
          
        rplot_list <- c(unique(data_lmstatsx_total$model),"No significant trend")
        
        data_m1$j_stroke1 <- 1
        data_m1$j_stroke2 <- data_m1$w_disc
        data_m1$j_stroke3 <- data_m1$w_func
        data_m1$j_stroke4 <- 1
        data_m1$j_stroke5 <- data_m1$wg_disc
        data_m1$j_stroke6 <- data_m1$wg_func
        data_m1$j_stroke0 <- 1
        
        if(selmodel==7){
          selmodel_name <- "No significant trend"
          selmodel_nobs <- max(data_lmstatsx_total$nobs)
          selmodel_r2 <- "0"
          data_m1$w_stroke = 1
        } else {
          selmodel_name <- data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln==data_lmstatsx_total$selmodel,]$model
          selmodel_nobs <- data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln==data_lmstatsx_total$selmodel,]$nobs
          selmodel_r2 <- round(data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln==data_lmstatsx_total$selmodel,]$adj.r.squared,2)
          if (selmodel %in% c(1,4)) {
              data_m1$w_stroke <- 1
          } else if (selmodel %in% c(2)) {
              data_m1$w_stroke <- ifelse(data_m1$w_disc<1,0.2,1)
          } else if (selmodel %in% c(3)) {
              data_m1$w_stroke <- data_m1$w_func
          } else if (selmodel %in% c(5)) {
              data_m1$w_stroke <- ifelse(data_m1$wg_disc<1,0.2,1)
          } else {
              data_m1$w_stroke <- data_m1$wg_func
          }

        }
        data_lmstatsv_total[data_lmstatsv_total$feature==i & data_lmstatsv_total$visit==visit, ]$selmodel <- ifelse(selmodel>0, selmodel,NA)
        data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$feature==i & data_lmstatsx_total$visit==visit, ]$selmodel <- ifelse(selmodel>0, selmodel,NA)
        data_lmstatsv_total[data_lmstatsv_total$feature==i & data_lmstatsv_total$visit==visit, ]$selmodel_name <- ifelse(selmodel>0, selmodel_name,NA)
        data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$feature==i & data_lmstatsx_total$visit==visit, ]$selmodel_name <- ifelse(selmodel>0, selmodel_name,NA)
        
        #compile weights and residuals
        data_tresidw$selmodel <- ifelse(selmodel > 0, selmodel,NA)
        data_residv_total <- rbind(data_residv_total,data_tresidw)

        title_str1 <- paste0(i,", Visit: ",visit)
        nr2 <- paste0("Best: ", data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln==data_lmstatsx_total$selmodel,]$model, ", R2 adjusted: ", round(data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln==data_lmstatsx_total$selmodel,]$adj.r.squared,2), ", n: ", data_lmstatsx_total[data_lmstatsx_total$modeln==data_lmstatsx_total$selmodel,]$nobs)
        mintotigg <- min(as.numeric(data_m1$log_total_IgG_MFI), na.rm = TRUE)
        maxtotigg <- max(as.numeric(data_m1$log_total_IgG_MFI), na.rm = TRUE)
        maxfeature <- max(as.numeric(data_m1$log_assay_value), na.rm = TRUE)
        
        mp0<-ggplot(data=data_m1, aes(x=log_total_IgG_MFI, y=log_assay_value, color=arm_name)) +
          geom_point(aes(color=arm_name, stroke=w_stroke), show.legend = TRUE, shape=21) +
          geom_line(aes(x = log_total_IgG_MFI, y = fitted.value_mod1), color="black", size=0.5) +
          geom_line(aes(x = log_total_IgG_MFI, y = fitted.value_mod2), color="red", size=0.5) +
          geom_line(aes(x = log_total_IgG_MFI, y = fitted.value_mod3), color="blue", size=0.5) +
          geom_line(aes(x = log_total_IgG_MFI, y = fitted.value_mod4), color="green", size=0.5) +
          geom_line(aes(x = log_total_IgG_MFI, y = fitted.value_mod5), color="purple", size=0.5) +
          geom_line(aes(x = log_total_IgG_MFI, y = fitted.value_mod6), color="darkgreen", size=0.5) +
          geom_line(aes(x = log_total_IgG_MFI, y = mean_observed), color="#E9A3C9", size=0.5) +
          scale_color_manual(name = "Study arm", values = color.values, labels = color.labels) +
          # annotate(geom="text", x =(mintotigg + (0.2 * maxtotigg)),
          #          y = (1.06 * maxfeature), label=nr2, color="black") +
          labs(x = xlabel, y = ylabel, title=title_str1, subtitle = nr2, caption = "Symbol weights are proportional to their boldness - weighted according to best fit model.") +
          theme_bw() +
          theme(plot.title = element_text(face="bold"),
              plot.subtitle = element_text(),
              plot.caption = element_text(),
              plot.caption.position = "plot",
             legend.position= c(1, 0),
             legend.direction =  "vertical",
             legend.justification = c(1, 0),
             legend.background = element_rect(linetype="solid",colour ="black"),
             legend.title = element_text())
        m <- list()
        h <- list()
        fitted.values <- c("fitted.value_mod1","fitted.value_mod2","fitted.value_mod3","fitted.value_mod4","fitted.value_mod5","fitted.value_mod6","fitted.value_mod0")
        resid <- c("resid_mod1","resid_mod2","resid_mod3","resid_mod4","resid_mod5","resid_mod6","resid_mod0")
        j_stroke <- c("j_stroke1","j_stroke2","j_stroke3","j_stroke4","j_stroke5","j_stroke6","j_stroke0")
        # print(paste("before_rplot_loop"))
        for (j in 1:length(rplot_list)) {
          rplot <- rplot_list[j]
          if (rplot %in% (c("linear: discrete"))) {
            rplot.title <- paste0(rplot, ": ", zero_weights, " points excluded")
          } else if (rplot %in% (c("gam: discrete"))) {
            rplot.title <- paste0(rplot, ": ", zerog_weights, " points excluded")
          } else {
            rplot.title <- rplot
          }

          data_m1$fity <- data_m1[ , fitted.values[[j]]]
          data_m1$residy <- data_m1[ , resid[[j]]]
          data_m1$stroky <- data_m1[ , j_stroke[[j]]]

          max_resid <- max(data_m1$residy,na.rm = TRUE)
          min_resid <- min(data_m1$residy,na.rm = TRUE)
          # print(paste("in_rplot_loop"))
          m[[j]] <- ggplot(data=data_m1, aes(x=fity, y=residy, color=arm_name)) +
            geom_point(aes(color=arm_name, stroke=stroky), shape=21, show.legend = FALSE) +
            geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = rplot.color[j]) +
            geom_smooth(color="orange", method = "loess", se=TRUE, size=0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
            labs(y = "Residual", x = "Fitted Value", title = rplot.title, caption = "Loess fit  ") +
            scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min_resid, max_resid)) +
                         theme_bw() +
                         theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 10),
                               legend.title = element_text(),
                               plot.margin = unit(c(0,0,0,0), "lines"),
                               plot.caption = element_text(color="orange"))

          h[[j]] <- ggplot(data=data_m1, aes(x = residy)) +
            geom_density(aes(color = arm_name, fill = arm_name), alpha = 0.2, show.legend = FALSE) +
            stat_function(fun = dnorm,
                          n = 101,
                          size = 0.8,
                          args = list(mean = mean(data_m1$residy), sd = sd(data_m1$residy)),
                          color = rplot.color[j],
                          show.legend = FALSE,
                          na.rm = TRUE) +
            coord_flip() + labs(title="", subtitle="", y="Density", x="", caption = "Normal dist. fit") +
            scale_x_continuous(limits = c(min_resid, max_resid)) +
            theme_bw() +
            theme(plot.title = element_blank(),
                               legend.title = element_blank(),
                               plot.margin = unit(c(0,0,0,0), "lines"),
                               plot.caption = element_text(color=rplot.color[selmodel])
                  )
        }

        #compile plots
        residual_plots <- ggarrange (
           ggarrange(m[[1]] + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                                    plot.caption = element_blank()),
                     h[[1]] + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                                    plot.caption = element_blank()),
                     ncol = 2, nrow = 1, align = "v",
                     legend = "none", widths = c(2,1)),
           ggarrange(m[[4]] + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                                    plot.caption = element_blank()),
                     h[[4]] + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                                    plot.caption = element_blank()),
                     ncol = 2, nrow = 1, align = "v",
                     legend = "none", widths = c(2,1)),
           ggarrange(m[[2]] + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                                    plot.caption = element_blank()),
                     h[[2]] + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                                    plot.caption = element_blank()),
                     ncol = 2, nrow = 1, align = "v",
                     legend = "none", widths = c(2,1)),
           ggarrange(m[[5]] + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                                    plot.caption = element_blank()),
                     h[[5]] + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                                    plot.caption = element_blank()),
                     ncol = 2, nrow = 1, align = "v",
                     legend = "none", widths = c(2,1)),
           ggarrange(m[[3]] + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                                    plot.caption = element_blank()),
                     h[[3]] + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                                    plot.caption = element_blank()),
                     ncol = 2, nrow = 1, align = "v",
                     legend = "none", widths = c(2,1)),
           ggarrange(m[[6]] + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                                    plot.caption = element_blank()),
                     h[[6]] + theme(axis.title = element_blank(),
                                    plot.caption = element_blank()),
                     ncol = 2, nrow = 1, align = "v",
                     legend = "none", widths = c(2,1)),
                    ncol = 2, nrow = 3, legend = "none")

        multi_plot<- ggarrange(mp0,
                               m[[selmodel]],
                               h[[selmodel]],
                               align = "v",
                               ##legend = "none",
                               ncol = 3, nrow = 1,
                               widths = c(3,2,1),
                               common.legend = F)
        knitr::knit_print(multi_plot)
        cat("\n \n")

        knitr::knit_print(residual_plots)
        cat("\n \n")
        # }
        data_lmstatsx_total = data_lmstatsx_total[0, ]
    }
  }    

save(data_residv_total, file = residual_filename_wp)
save(data_lmstatsv_total, file = modelfit_filename_wp)

## workflowr
# library(here)
## workflowr::wflow_build(files = here::here("./analysis/standard_serology_igg_wp_matpm_prevacvacc_j.Rmd"))

```
